_note: CowSense AI — Demo Test Inputs. Sandra Kimiring owns this file. All team members contribute edge cases.

_sources.disease_symptoms: KALRO Dairy Value Chain ToT Manual 2020, Module 2: Dairy Animal Health
_sources.treatment_data: ILRI Smallholder Dairy Farmer Training Manual, 2nd Edition, 2019
_sources.regions: Kenya Climate Smart Agriculture Strategy 2017–2026 (24 target counties)
_sources.farmer_ids: DigiCow Africa Ndume platform field structure (AYuTe 2023)

health_check_scenarios.name: Demo Scenario 1 — East Coast Fever (URGENT)
health_check_scenarios.notes: Classic ECF presentation. Hallmark: prescapular lymph node swelling + fever 40-41°C. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: ECF with breathing symptoms
health_check_scenarios.notes: Advanced ECF with pulmonary involvement. Urgency even higher.

health_check_scenarios.name: Mastitis — clinical
health_check_scenarios.notes: Clinical mastitis. Agent can treat at home. Source: KALRO Module 2, Section 2.6.6.

health_check_scenarios.name: Bloat — URGENT
health_check_scenarios.notes: Fatal if untreated within 1-2 hours. Source: KALRO/ILRI.

health_check_scenarios.name: FMD — notifiable
health_check_scenarios.notes: FMD is highly contagious. Notify DVS. Isolate immediately. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: Lumpy Skin Disease
health_check_scenarios.notes: LSD nodules are firm, round, raised 2-5cm. Pathognomonic. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: Babesiosis (Redwater)
health_check_scenarios.notes: Red/dark urine = haemoglobinuria. Pathognomonic. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: Internal Parasites — chronic
health_check_scenarios.notes: Bottle jaw = submandibular oedema from protein deficiency. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: Pink Eye
health_check_scenarios.notes: Corneal opacity in advanced cases. Source: KALRO Module 2.

health_check_scenarios.name: Brucellosis — notifiable
health_check_scenarios.notes: NOTIFIABLE. Test-and-slaughter policy. Zoonotic risk. Source: KALRO Module 2.

market_price_scenarios.name: Demo Scenario 2 — Eldoret sell recommendation
market_price_scenarios.notes: Kipchumba has 30L. Best price is Nairobi at KES 55 vs local KES 46.

market_price_scenarios.name: Nakuru — rising price
market_price_scenarios.notes: Brookside active. Rising trend = sell now.

market_price_scenarios.name: Meru — falling, hold
market_price_scenarios.notes: Seasonal oversupply. Agent should advise holding.

credit_profile_scenarios.name: Band D — not yet eligible (Achieng)
credit_profile_scenarios.notes: No M-Pesa + 3 months + 10L + 2 cows. Needs improvement.

prioritization_scenarios.name: Agent A001 prioritization
prioritization_scenarios.notes: F001 has HEALTH_CHECK flag → should rank #1
